ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tweets" (
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tweet */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text content of the tweet */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tweet was posted */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the tweet (e.g., Twitter for iPhone) */,
  "expanded_urls" TEXT /* Expanded URLs associated with the tweet */,
  "rating_numerator" INTEGER /* Numerator of the rating given to the tweet */,
  "rating_denominator" INTEGER /* Denominator of the rating given to the tweet */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dog in the tweet (if applicable) */,
  "dog_stage" TEXT /* Stage of the dog in the tweet (if applicable) */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Social media platform from which the tweet was collected */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who posted the tweet */,
  "content_type" TEXT /* Type of content (e.g., image, video, text-only) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location from which the tweet was posted */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the tweet */,
  "is_retweet" INTEGER /* Indicates if the tweet is a retweet */,
  "retweet_of_tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the original tweet if it is a retweet */,
  "engagement_score" REAL /* Combined engagement score (e.g., likes + retweets + comments) */,
  "engagement_details" TEXT /* Detailed engagement metrics (e.g., likes, retweets, comments) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions of the user (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiments" (
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment analysis */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet being analyzed */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the tweet (e.g., -1.0 to 1.0) */,
  "sentiment_type" TEXT /* Type of sentiment (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence level of the sentiment analysis */,
  "sentiment_details" TEXT /* Additional sentiment details (e.g., positive, negative, neutral words) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiments_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet being rated */,
  "rating_score" REAL /* Rating score of the tweet (e.g., 1-10) */,
  "rating_type" TEXT /* Type of rating (e.g., humor, cuteness, relevance) */,
  "rater_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who provided the rating */,
  "rating_details" TEXT /* Additional rating details (e.g., comments, reasons for the rating) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_rater_id FOREIGN KEY ("rater_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media" (
  "media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet the media is associated with */,
  "media_type" TEXT /* Type of media (e.g., image, video) */,
  "media_url" TEXT /* URL of the media */,
  "thumbnail_url" TEXT /* URL of a thumbnail image */,
  "media_duration" REAL /* Duration of the media (for videos) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hashtags" (
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hashtag */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet the hashtag is associated with */,
  "hashtag_text" TEXT /* Text of the hashtag */,
  "hashtag_popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity of the hashtag */,
  "hashtag_trendiness" INTEGER /* Trendiness of the hashtag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hashtag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hashtags_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mentions" (
  "mention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mention */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet the mention is associated with */,
  "mention_text" TEXT /* Text of the mention */,
  "mention_type" TEXT /* Type of mention (e.g., user, brand) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mentions_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "urls" (
  "url_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each URL */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet the URL is associated with */,
  "url_text" TEXT /* Text of the URL */,
  "url_domain" TEXT /* Domain of the URL */,
  "url_type" TEXT /* Type of URL (e.g., link to an article, link to another tweet) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("url_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_urls_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "retweets" (
  "retweet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each retweet */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet being retweeted */,
  "retweet_text" TEXT /* Text of the retweet */,
  "retweet_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the tweet has been retweeted */,
  "retweeter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who retweeted it */,
  "retweet_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the retweet (e.g., comments, context) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("retweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_retweets_retweeter_id FOREIGN KEY ("retweeter_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_retweets_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (e.g., like, retweet, comment) */,
  "engagement_count" INTEGER /* Number of engagements */,
  "engagement_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the engagement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engagement_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend */,
  "trend_name" TEXT /* Name of the trend */,
  "trend_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the trend */,
  "trend_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trend */,
  "trend_popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity of the trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id")
)
